label: Transparent arctic hare motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Arctic Hare transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an arctic hare fur motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as a single complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A crouched arctic hare with dense snow-white winter fur, frost-grey underfur shadows, black eye contrast, pale grey ear rims, compact tundra body shape, short tail, visible fine fur texture, and subtle cold-weather anatomy. It must read as arctic hare, not rabbit pet, fox, or snow leopard.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include ears, full body, paws, and tail without cropping. Clean studio lighting, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no domestic rabbit styling, no fox, no cat, no antlers, no landscape, no snowdrift base, no props, no text, no watermark, no second animal.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Arctic Hare light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Arctic Hare", derived from the visible arctic hare fur cutout. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible product UI theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Arctic Hare, Arctic Hare Fur, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract the palette and interaction language from snow-white fur, frost-grey shadows, black eye contrast, pale ear-edge grey, muted tundra lichen, packed-snow surfaces, and polar charcoal depth. The board must read as arctic hare winter minimalism, not generic snowflake or leopard.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible on pale surfaces.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Style: minimal winter product system, precise 8px grid, 8px card radius, snow-fur backgrounds, frost-grey primary actions, black-eye focus rings, soft ear-shadow accents, tundra lichen success states, fur-grain texture, thin cold-grey borders, restrained shadows.
Constraints: no snowflake theme, no snow leopard spots, no domestic rabbit toy look, no generic purple/blue gradients, no beige-only palette, no random saturated colors, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Arctic Hare", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Arctic Hare dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Arctic Hare". It must feel like the visible light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the visible arctic hare fur cutout.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Arctic Hare, Arctic Hare Fur, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve the same arctic hare system language as the visible light board: polar charcoal backgrounds, snow-fur foregrounds, frost-grey actions, black-eye focus detail, pale ear-shadow accents, tundra lichen status, soft fur-grain texture, restrained 8px component grid.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible on dark cold surfaces.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Visual details: charcoal tundra panels, off-white text, frost-grey active controls, muted lichen success, ear-shadow warning accents, soft fur texture overlays, low-glare contrast, crisp cards and controls.
Constraints: no snow leopard spots, no neon blue ice theme, no pure-black-only flat background, no generic purple gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Arctic Hare", no illegible tiny paragraphs.
